channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe '60s Jazz Bass Fretless 2019 - Present - 3-Color Sunburst - With Dimarzio Pickups & Case — $319.95
item.description:
$319.95 · Very Good · B & B Loan Company

This item is pre-owned & previously used.

  • All our inventory is inspected, cleaned & detailed, tested and/or professionally set up (guitars), and ready to be used & enjoyed.
  • A basic, single picture is generally taken; but more pictures can be added by request before deciding to make a drive for local pickup. And of course more pictures can be added if we agree to ship out an item.
  • Our inventory is primary listed on Reverb for local sales & in-store pickup. We use Reverb as a means of advertising and shipping "hard to sell" items. A strong in-store used inventory keeps a brick & mortar music store still relevant in modern times. Offering a nice selection of music gear as a brick & mortar store is essential; can't be a retail music store without any inventory!!!
  • Despite our stubbornness, SOMETIMES shipping can be offered on an item to item basis. If we decide we’re ready to ship, a shipping price will be added to the listing.
  • Feel free to ask us to ship an item; the worst we can do is say, “no”. But being nasty and/or trying to “educate” us how to run a business will not convince us to make an exception. I know it can be frustrating, but we simply lack the capacity to prioritize online sales & shipping over properly operating a brick & mortar pawn shop.
  • Lastly, shipping price charged is simply my best estimate, and any overpayment will be refunded. Shipping charges across the entire United States can vary widely; so I would rather error higher than lower. And as promised, I'll refund the possible overpayment.

B & B Loan store hours: 9am - 6pm EST, Monday – Saturday. Located in Fort Wayne, IN.

Thank you for considering shopping with us!

-B & B Loan Company

item.title: Yamaha SB-2a "Flying Samurai" 1967 - 3T Sunburst — $1,243.22
item.description:
$1,243.22 · Very Good · Matteo's Gear Emporium

I'm selling this 1967 Yamaha gem with an elegant-crazy, retro aesthetic. It features a single single-coil pickup for a powerful, articulate sound - it sounds just like a double bass - with exceptional warmth and clarity, perfect for rock, surf, and vintage soul. With its comfortable medium scale and distinctive '60s styling, this rare instrument is an exceptional piece for both a collector's item and for anyone looking to play something truly special.

Excellent condition considering its age, with minor signs of use. The neck is straight and the action is low, the truss rod is in good condition, and it weighs 3.8 kg. No case included.

item.title: Roscoe SKB-3005 Standard Plus 5-String Bass — Koa / Chambered Swamp Ash — Aguilar OBP-3 — Excellent — $2,950
item.description:
$2,950 · Excellent · Savannah Bass

Selling my Roscoe SKB-3005 Standard Plus 5-string bass. This is a killer boutique 5 with a koa top, chambered swamp ash body, 35" scale, and 18mm string spacing. It has the fast, refined Roscoe feel, a compound radius board, and a clear modern J/J voice with plenty of flexibility.

Specs:

  • 5-string fretted bass
  • 35" scale
  • 18mm string spacing
  • Koa / chambered swamp ash body
  • Aguilar J pickups
  • Aguilar OBP-3 preamp
  • Compound radius fingerboard
  • DR Sunbeams .045–.130
  • Original soft case included
  • Weight: 8 lb 8 oz

Condition is Excellent to Mint. No major issues, no functional problems, and it has been very well cared for. This is a lightweight, professional boutique 5-string with a big, clear, articulate tone.

Ships packed safely and fully insured.

item.title: G&L Tribute JB-2 4-String Bass Guitar Shell Pink Finish — $549.95
item.description:
$549.95 · Mint · Morrell Music Co.

This 2025 G&L Tribute JB-2 4-Stirng Bass Guitar has been a demo in our retail store. It is in mint condition and shows no dings, dents, scratches, or any signs of heavy play. This bass has been professionally set up and plays great! The neck is straight, the action is low and comfortable, and the frets are in excellent condition. Awesome deal on a fantastic playing and sounding G&L Tribute JB-2 in a gorgeous Gloss Shell Pink Finish!


Players fond of the old adage “if it ain’t broke…” haven’t played a JB•2. You see, the G&L JB•2 is all about refinement, blending “holy grail” Alnico single-coil tone with modern Leo Fender† improvements.

The JB•2’s classic Alnico V pickups have tone reminiscent of the best examples from the early ‘60s, thanks to the work of Paul Gagon, G&L VP Engineering. Gagon found his inspiration reviewing original prints stored in Leo Fender’s private laboratory at G&L, but that was just the start. About 30 years ago, Gagon was an R&D; engineer at another company when he was tasked with finding out what was so special about the early bolt-on basses many players raved about. Gagon tirelessly analyzed many examples of what were considered holy grail basses, spending time out on the shop floor talking to builders still working in the pickup department since the ‘50s, all on a quest to discover where the real mojo was – and wasn’t. What he learned from the builders matched his own engineering analysis. You see, back in the day, the actual spec of pickups coming down that old production line varied considerably. That meant coming up with the right specs was more challenging than simply following the prints, and Gagon’s persistence paid off as the JB-2 serves up delicious, classic tone.

While the pickups are the origin of the tone, the JB•2 will surprise you with a clarity and sustain unmatched by old basses with their rudimentary bridge design. You see, the JB•2 features an innovative G&L Saddle-Lock™ bridge to transfer string energy right into the body end-grain for an incredibly resonant instrument. If you’re ready to let go of the past but still love that classic Alnico tone, get your hands on a JB•2 and experience a brilliant mash-up of old-school and new-school Leo. Once you play a G&L Tribute Series, you’ll never look back.


  • CONSTRUCTION: bolt-on
  • SCALE: 34"
  • PICKUPS: 2x G&L Alnico single coil pickups
  • BODY WOOD: Poplar & Swamp Ash Top over Poplar
  • NECK WOOD: Hard-Rock Maple with Maple fingerboard
  • NECK WIDTH AT NUT: 1 1/2"
  • NECK RADIUS: 12"
  • NECK PROFILE: medium C
  • FRETS: 21 medium jumbo, nickel
  • TUNING KEYS: Traditional open-back
  • BRIDGE: Leo Fender-designed G&L Saddle-Lock
  • ELECTRONICS: One volume control for each pickup, master tone

item.title: Fender Active Jazz Bass Deluxe Series 2002 Sunburst Suhr Pickups 4 String Bass Guitar — $649.95
item.description:
$649.95 · Very Good · B & B Loan Company

This item is pre-owned & previously used.

  • All our inventory is inspected, cleaned & detailed, tested and/or professionally set up (guitars), and ready to be used & enjoyed.
  • A basic, single picture is generally taken; but more pictures can be added by request before deciding to make a drive for local pickup. And of course more pictures can be added if we agree to ship out an item.

A strong in-store used inventory keeps a brick & mortar music store still relevant in modern times. Offering a nice selection of music gear as a brick & mortar store is essential; can't be a retail music store without any inventory!!!
  • Despite our stubbornness, SOMETIMES shipping can be offered on an item to item basis. If we decide we’re ready to ship, a shipping price will be added to the listing.

I know it can be frustrating, but we simply lack the capacity to prioritize online sales & shipping over properly operating a brick & mortar pawn shop.

item.title: Aria Pro II SB Black N Gold Vintage Bass 1980’s - Black - w/ Hard Case - MODDED — $2,199.99
item.description:
$2,199.99 · Very Good · Music Go Round Columbus Ohio

This Aria Pro II 1980s is in very good condition. It has some light scratches and couple small dings. Item comes with hard case. Please refer to the photos for visuals of the item's condition.

item.title: Jackson David Ellefson Megadeth X Series 5-String Concert Bass, Quicksilver — $799.99
item.description:
$799.99 · Brand New · Butler Music

Designed in conjunction with one of the founding fathers of thrash metal—highly acclaimed bassist David Ellefson of Megadeth—the 5-string David Ellefson CBX V is a beast of a bass. Bearing his personal touches, packed with enormous Jackson sound and the hyper-fast playability required by the fleet-fingered bassist, this instrument is a force to be reckoned with.

The photos in this ad are actual photos of the one you will get. This great bass weighs in at 8 pounds, 13.8 ounces and carries the serial number ICJ2520806. 

Redesigned ergonomic contours provide the perfect platform for launching a musical assault—the upper contour provides a comfortably stable anchor for pick or fingerstyle playing alike while the lower contour provides perfect balance when propped on a knee for monitor stands. The Jackson HiMass™ 5-string bridge sharpens your notes’ attack for extra punch and clarity, granting enhanced sustain without significantly altering the bass’ fundamental tone. An earth-shaking pair of EMG® HZ40 active humbucking pickups in the neck and bridge positions provide plenty of girth and cut as an active 3-band EQ bolsters their native power, shaping and refining it for maximum impact and versatility. The blend knob allows you to mix the pickups to your taste—add more neck pickup for a touch of warmth, or bring up the bridge pickup for more cut. Designed for highly technical lightspeed playing, the 12”-16” compound radius rosewood fingerboard flattens out as you move up the neck for increased playing comfort and speedy articulation.

This bass proudly displays Jackson’s distinctive style; all-black hardware, including everything from the bridge to the Jackson die-cast sealed tuning machines, durable gloss finish, pearloid sharkfin neck inlays, single ply white neck binding and Jackson’s signature pointed 5-In-Line headstock along with a silver “Fallout” logo and Ellefson’s signature embossed on the truss rod cover. Only one instrument is hardcore enough to keep pace with Ellefson’s technically demanding requirements—the Jackson David Ellefson CBX V—and now it can be yours.

Product Specs
  • Model Name X Series Signature David Ellefson Concert™ Bass CBX V, Laurel Fingerboard, Quicksilver
  • Model # 2916949521
  • Series Artist Signature
  • Country Of Origin ID
  • Color Quicksilver
  • Body Poplar
  • Body Finish Gloss
  • Body Shape Concert™ Bass
  • Neck Materia 1-Piece Maple
  • Neck Finish Satin
  • Scale Length 34" (86.36 cm)
  • Fingerboard Laurel
  • Fingerboard Radius 12"-16" Compound Radius (304.8 mm to 406.4 mm)
  • Number of Frets 21
  • Frets Size Jumbo
  • String Nut Black Plastic
  • Nut Width 1.75" (44.45 mm)
  • Position Inlays Pearloid Sharkfin
  • Truss Rods Dual-Action
  • Truss Rod Wrench 4 mm Hex (Allen)
  • Bridge Pickup EMG® HZ40B
  • Neck Pickup EMG® HZ40N
  • Controls Volume, Blend and Active Three-Band EQ (Bass, Middle, Treble)
  • Pickup Switching Blend Control
  • Pickup Configuration HH
  • Bridge Jackson HiMass™
  • Hardware Finish Black
  • Tuning Machines Jackson® Sealed Die-Cast
  • Pickguard None
  • Control Knobs Dome-Style
  • Strings Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.130 Gauges)

item.title: Dingwall NG3 Nolly 5-String Bass Guitar – Fiesta Red — $3,061.61
item.description:
$3,061.61 · Brand New · Axe Palace

Dingwall NG3 5-String Adam “Nolly” Getgood Signature Bass in Fiesta Red.

This new 2026 NG3 features an Alder body, Maple fingerboard, Dingwall FD-3N Neodymium pickups with Darkglass Tone Capsule 3-band pre-amp, 24 fret medium-thin neck, and a heavy duty soft case. The ultra-stable neck is ergonomic with a 33.25″ to 37 inch multi-scale design for maximum note definition and comfort.

The Dingwall NG3 is a dream come true for bassists in both the studio or stage with its tight, articulate punchy tone and impressive versatility. The Maple necks are perfectly stable, fretwork is spotless, and will provide a life-time of excellent performance.

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man 25th Anniversary HH 2009 - Trans Red — $2,300
item.description:
$2,300 · Good · DudeRasta's Music Stuff

25th Anniversary EBMM 5 HH not the gamechanger circuit. I have gigged this bass for several years, it is no case queen. Located in Central Fl. I would rather not ship it, prefer to have the seller inspect before purchase. Little buckle rash and a small clearcoat scratch on front that will probably polish out but I haven't tried yet. Includes EBMM Hardshell Case.

item.title: Dingwall NG3 Nolly 6-String Bass Guitar – Fiesta Red — $3,160.41
item.description:
$3,160.41 · Brand New · Axe Palace

Dingwall NG3 6-String Adam “Nolly” Getgood Signature Bass in Fiesta Red.

This new 2026 NG3 features an Alder body, Maple fingerboard, Dingwall FD-3N Neodymium pickups with Darkglass Tone Capsule 3-band pre-amp, 24 fret medium-thin neck, and a heavy duty soft case. The ultra-stable neck is ergonomic with a 33.25″ to 37 inch multi-scale design for maximum note definition and comfort.

The Dingwall NG3 is a dream come true for bassists in both the studio or stage with its tight, articulate punchy tone and impressive versatility. The Maple necks are perfectly stable, fretwork is spotless, and will provide a life-time of excellent performance.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe '60s Precision Bass 2019 - Present - Olympic White — $380
item.description:
$380 · Excellent · Mrfecto

This item is in excellent condition. The strings have been replaced with D’Addario medium flat wound strings. No bag/box

item.title: Dingwall NG3 Nolly 6-String Bass Guitar – Ducati White — $3,160.41
item.description:
$3,160.41 · Brand New · Axe Palace

Dingwall NG3 6-String Adam “Nolly” Getgood Signature Bass in Ducati White.

This new 2026 NG3 features an Alder body, Maple fingerboard, Dingwall FD-3N Neodymium pickups with Darkglass Tone Capsule 3-band pre-amp, 24 fret medium-thin neck, and a heavy duty soft case. The ultra-stable neck is ergonomic with a 33.25″ to 37 inch multi-scale design for maximum note definition and comfort.

The Dingwall NG3 is a dream come true for bassists in both the studio or stage with its tight, articulate punchy tone and impressive versatility. The Maple necks are perfectly stable, fretwork is spotless, and will provide a life-time of excellent performance.

item.title: Fender Custom Shop Ltd. '66 Jazz Bass 2024 - Lake Placid Blue Journeyman Relic — $5,199
item.description:
$5,199 · Brand New · The Bass Shop

Product details:

We totally dig all aspects of the Custom Shop Jazz. Classic color with matching headstock, bound neck with block inlays, and of course....lollipop tuners. Just over 9 lbs. and a great player.

WEIGHT:  9 lbs. 3 ozs.   

SERIAL #:  CZ579167

DATE:  2024 

NUT WIDTH:  1 1/2"  

RADIUS:  7.25"

COLOR:  Lake Placid Blue Journeyman Relic

BODY/NECK/FINGERBOARD:  Alder/ Quarter Sawn Maple/ Rosewood w/ Block Inlays

PICKUPS/ELECTRONICS:  Fender Hand Wound Vintage Jazz Bass/ Vol., Vol., Tone

CONDITION:  Brand New

CASE:  OHSC w/ Case Candy, Build Sheet, COA

item.title: C-1965 Mosrite Celebrity III — $1,199
item.description:
$1,199 · Good · Woody's Gear Garage

All original except the bridge cover.Has some scuffs scratches dents and dings but nothing major.The original Red finish has faded to a very cool orange.Neck is straight low action plays easy-unique 60’s mosrite tone.

item.title: Dingwall NG3 5-String “Nolly” Signature Bass - Deep Forrest Green — $3,061.61
item.description:
$3,061.61 · Brand New · Axe Palace

Dingwall NG3 5-String Adam "Nolly" Getgood Signature Bass in Ferarri Green.

This brand new NG3 features an Alder body, Maple fingerboard, Dingwall FD-3N Neodymium pickups with Darkglass Tone Capsule 3-band pre-amp, 24 fret medium-thin neck, and a heavy duty soft case. The ultra-stable neck is ergonomic with a 34 to 37 inch multi-scale design for maximum note definition and comfort.

The Dingwall NG3 is a dream come true for bassists in both the studio or stage with its tight, articulate punchy tone and impressive versatility. The Maple necks are perfectly stable, fretwork is spotless, and will provide a life-time of excellent performance.

Axe Palace is an authorized dealer and every Dingwall we sell gets a FREE pro setup for whatever tuning you would like.

item.title: Fender Player Plus Top 2022 - Blue Burst — $750
item.description:
$750 · Excellent · Nolan Cota

For sale is one of my beloved modded MIM Jazz basses. It is a 2022 Fender Player series Plus Top GC Exclusive in Blue Burst. I no longer have the stock parts that I had swapped out, but these are modifications I had made to enhance it and I have happily played it numerous times both in studio and at gigs. Selling because I mainly use my MIJ 60’s Hybrid now and this has been sitting its bag.

Features/mods: 

  • Seymour Duncan Quarter Pounder pickups
  • Fender Hi-Mass bridge
  • Purple pearl pickguard (will also throw in another custom swirled guard from Carmedon that I have)
  • Fender maple 7.25” radius Jazz neck (from 2012 FSR Antigua w/ bullet truss rod)
  • 34” scale length
  • Currently equipped with DR Hi-Beams .45-.105
  • Gig bag included 

This thing plays wonderfully, and the current strings are still holding up very well. Shipping only available to CONUS. Please message me with any questions. Thank you.

item.title: Cort GB Fusion 4 String Electric Bass Guitar - Blue Burst — $520
item.description:
$520 · Excellent · Joseph's Gear Outlet

This is a brand new.

Please feel free to ask any questions.

Thank you!

item.title: Dingwall NG3 5-String Nolly Signature Bass - Ferrari Green — $3,061.61
item.description:
$3,061.61 · Brand New · Axe Palace

Dingwall NG3 5-String Adam "Nolly" Getgood Signature Bass in Ferarri Green.

This brand new NG3 features an Alder body, Maple fingerboard, Dingwall FD-3N Neodymium pickups with Darkglass Tone Capsule 3-band pre-amp, 24 fret medium-thin neck, and a heavy duty soft case. The ultra-stable neck is ergonomic with a 34 to 37 inch multi-scale design for maximum note definition and comfort.

The Dingwall NG3 is a dream come true for bassists in both the studio or stage with its tight, articulate punchy tone and impressive versatility. The Maple necks are perfectly stable, fretwork is spotless, and will provide a life-time of excellent performance.

Axe Palace is an authorized dealer and every Dingwall we sell gets a FREE pro setup for whatever tuning you would like.

item.title: Fender custom shop 63 Precision Bass- Relic surf green — $3,499
item.description:
$3,499 · Excellent · Jeffrey's Gear Outlet

Up for sale is a Fender CS 63 P Bass. it has a relic surf green finish with really nice checking. the body is Alder and the neck is maple with a rosewood fretboard. The bass is very warm and thumpy and it cuts through the mix with no problem! And It’s a comfortable 8.9 lbs. its sporting round wound strings at the moment but it sounds supper buttery with flats! It’s a really nice bass but I’m not gigging and it’s just sitting in the case doing nothing. It will ship in the OHSC which is in great condition. CONUS shipping only! Not interested in any trades!

item.title: Mayones Cali 5 Mini Bass Flame Walnut Natural — $2,110
item.description:
$2,110 · Brand New · Ish Guitars

Mayones Cali 5 Mini Bass Flame Walnut Natural

Weight: 5.9 lbs

DESCRIPTION

It might be half the size of Mayones' custom series basses, but the Cali carries the same design philosophy & great tone, playability and highest attention to build quality and ergonomy.

Neck-through-body construction (in both wenge and maple versions), beautiful top woods, highest quality fit & finish – no step has been skipped to ensure that the Cali bass is 100% of the Mayones quality you expect.

It has also one additional feature – the Cali is a perfect travel companion due to its compact size and built-in headphone amp. It’s easy to carry, pack and set up to play everywhere & anywhere.

Mayones' goal and intention is to save as much wood as they can in their production pipeline – Cali is built from leftovers of quality woods they use for their full-size instruments, which are too small to use in a regular-sized instrument. It's available in a limited number of copies per year.

SPECS

Weight: 5.9 lbs

Case Details: Gig Bag

Year: 2026


WOODS & CONSTRUCTION

RADIUS: 16"

WOOD - Neck: Maple-Mahogany-Wenge-Amazaque / 11ply

WOOD - Fretboard: Ebony

WOOD - Headstock: Top-matching

FRETS: FERD WAGNER Nickel Silver / 2.64× 1.20

FRETS - Number: 24

CONSTRUCTION: Neck-thru-body

SCALE: Mini Bass / 436mm

WOOD - Top: Walnut

WOOD - Body: Swamp Ash

CONFIG - Pickups: H (Bridge)

 

COLOR & FINISH

COLOUR - Body (top):  Trans Natural Matte

COLOUR - Body (back): Trans Natural Matte

COLOUR - Neck: Trans Natural Matte

COLOUR - Headstock:Trans Natural Matte

 

ELECTRONICS & HARDWARE

ELECTRONICS: VELVETRONE VELVETRONE / 3-Band CC Preamp and M-Heaphones system (2024) / (1xVol push-pull, 1xMid, 1xTre/Bass)

PICKUPS - Bass: VELVETRONE NOBLE 5 / Bridge

BRIDGE - Bass: MAYONES / X25-BLK / Two-piece Bass Bridge 5 / Black

TUNERS - Bass: Mayones MB-1070-BK-PE

NUT: Ebony

 

SWITCHES & SOCKETS

SWITCHCRAFT Jack ¼ in.
Headphones Jack ⅞ in.
AUX Jack ⅛ in. 

ADDITIONAL EQUIPMENT

SCHALLER Schaller Security Lock / Black 

SETUP & INSPECTED BY OUR TECH TEAM

All of our guitars come with a FREE professional setup to a comfortable action as specified by that instrument’s manufacturer. Our setups always include inspection of (and necessary adjustment to): action, intonation, tremolo angle, truss rod, frets, nut, bridge, and more. We can accommodate special setup requests - additional charges and/or shipping delays of 1-2 business days could occur.

INDIVIDUALLY PHOTOGRAPHED

After 15 years of innovation in our photography process, Ish Guitars has developed a way to get you the most accurate true-to-life color of every instrument we sell. We never embellish, oversaturate, or misrepresent our images, so that your buying experience can be as much like visiting our showroom as possible. Keep in mind that various computer screens can show colors a bit differently, so the color on your screen may not match the real thing perfectly no matter how hard we try. Also, unless otherwise noted, we individually list and photo every piece of gear that comes through our doors.

HEAR A LIVE DEMO

Experience our innovative Video Appointment service! Connect with our Gear Experts to hear this instrument played live over Zoom and receive one-on-one guidance. Contact us to schedule your appointment!

item.title: Mayones Cali 4 Mini Bass Curly Poplar — $2,090
item.description:
$2,090 · Brand New · Ish Guitars

Mayones Cali 4 Mini Bass Curly Poplar

Weight: 4.9 lbs

DESCRIPTION

It might be half the size of Mayones' custom series basses, but the Cali carries the same design philosophy & great tone, playability and highest attention to build quality and ergonomy.

Neck-through-body construction (in both wenge and maple versions), beautiful top woods, highest quality fit & finish – no step has been skipped to ensure that the Cali bass is 100% of the Mayones quality you expect.

It has also one additional feature – the Cali is a perfect travel companion due to its compact size and built-in headphone amp. It’s easy to carry, pack and set up to play everywhere & anywhere.

Mayones' goal and intention is to save as much wood as they can in their production pipeline – Cali is built from leftovers of quality woods they use for their full-size instruments, which are too small to use in a regular-sized instrument. It's available in a limited number of copies per year.

SPECS

Weight: 4.9 lbs

Case Details: Mayones Gig Bag

Year: 2026


WOODS & CONSTRUCTION

RADIUS: 16"

WOOD - Neck: Maple-Mahogany-Wenge-Amazaque / 11ply

WOOD - Fretboard: Ebony

WOOD - Headstock: Top-matching

FRETS: FERD WAGNER Nickel Silver / 2.64× 1.20

FRETS - Number: 24

CONSTRUCTION: Neck-thru-body

SCALE: Mini Bass / 436mm

BINDING: neck

WOOD - Top: Curly Poplar 3A

WOOD - Body: Swamp Ash

CONFIG - Pickups: H (Bridge)

 

COLOR & FINISH

COLOUR - Body (top):  Transparent Custom Color | Matte

COLOUR - Body (back): Trans Natural Matte

COLOUR - Neck: Trans Natural Matte

COLOUR - Headstock: Transparent Custom Color | Matte

 

ELECTRONICS & HARDWARE

ELECTRONICS: VELVETRONE VELVETRONE / 3-Band CC Preamp and M-Heaphones system (2024) / (1xVol push-pull, 1xMid, 1xTre/Bass)

PICKUPS - Bass: VELVETRONE NOBLE 4 / Bridge

BRIDGE - Bass: MAYONES / X24-BLK / Two-piece Bass Bridge 4 / Black

TUNERS - Bass: Risingguitar MB-1070-BK-PE

NUT: Ebony

SWITCHES: SWITCHCRAFT Jack ¼ in., Headphones Jack ⅞ in.m AUX Jack ⅛ in.

 ADDITIONAL EQUIPMENT: SCHALLER Schaller Security Lock / Black 

SETUP & INSPECTED BY OUR TECH TEAM

All of our guitars come with a FREE professional setup tailored to your individual tuning and string gauge preferences, if available. Our setups always include action, intonation, trem angle, and truss rod adjustments.  If needed, we smooth out fret edges, address any nut or bridge shim issues, polish the frets, and condition the fingerboard.  All work is completed by our experienced tech team who understand what today's players want from their instruments. If not otherwise requested our techs will setup each instrument to a comfortable medium/low action with minimal truss rod relief dependent on the instrument style. Please reach out after purchase if you have any specific requests about your setup.

INDIVIDUALLY PHOTOGRAPHED

After 15 years of innovation in our photography process, Ish Guitars has developed a way to get you the most accurate true-to-life color of every instrument we sell. We never embellish, oversaturate, or misrepresent our images, so that your buying experience can be as much like visiting our showroom as possible. Keep in mind that various computer screens can show colors a bit differently, so the color on your screen may not match the real thing perfectly no matter how hard we try. Also, unless otherwise noted, we individually list and photo every piece of gear that comes through our doors.

HEAR A LIVE DEMO

Experience our innovative Video Appointment service! Connect with one of our Gear Experts to hear this instrument played live over Zoom and receive personalized shopping guidance. Contact us to schedule your appointment!

item.title: Mayones Jabba Bassic VF 4 Green Metallic — $3,970
item.description:
$3,970 · Brand New · Ish Guitars

Mayones Jabba Bassic VF 4 Green Metallic

Weight: 9.3 lbs

SPECS

Weight: 9.3 lbs

Case Details: Mayones Gig Bag

Year: 2026


WOODS & CONSTRUCTION

RADIUS: 20"

WOOD - Neck: Maple / 1pc - Two CArbon rods

WOOD - Fretboard: Ebony

MARKERS - Side: SB-20 / Super blu edots

MARKERS - Front: Plain fretboard

FRETS: FERD WAGNER Nickel Silver / 2.64× 1.20

CONSTRUCTION: Bolt-on

SCALE: Bass Multiscale 32.25 - 34.25 

BINDING: no Binding

WOOD - Body: Sassafras

CONFIG - Pickups: H-H

 

COLOR & FINISH

COLOUR - Body (top):  Monolith Custom Matt - Green Metallic

COLOUR - Body (back): Monolith Custom Matt - Green Metallic

COLOUR - Neck: Trans Natural Matte

COLOUR - Headstock: Monolith Custom Matt - Green Metallic

 

ELECTRONICS & HARDWARE

ELECTRONICS: Volume (PP: Active/Passive), Balance, Treble/Bass, Middle,
Passive Tone - VELVETRONE / Musashi Nitory 3 / Bass Preamp and M-Heaphones system

PICKUPS - Bass: VELVETRONE NOBLE VF 4 / set

BRIDGE - Bass: Single Saddle Bridge 4

TUNERS - Bass: Hipshot Ultralite Clover / Black / 4 in line

NUT: Ebony

PICKGUARD: 3ply Black

 

SWITCHES & SOCKETS

SWITCHCRAFT Jack ¼ in.
Headphones Jack ⅞ in.
AUX Jack ⅛ in. 

ADDITIONAL EQUIPMENT

SCHALLER Schaller Security Lock / Black 

SETUP & INSPECTED BY OUR TECH TEAM

All of our guitars come with a FREE professional setup tailored to your individual tuning and string gauge preferences, if available. Our setups always include action, intonation, trem angle, and truss rod adjustments.  If needed, we smooth out fret edges, address any nut or bridge shim issues, polish the frets, and condition the fingerboard.  All work is completed by our experienced tech team who understand what today's players want from their instruments. If not otherwise requested our techs will setup each instrument to a comfortable medium/low action with minimal truss rod relief dependent on the instrument style. Please reach out after purchase if you have any specific requests about your setup.

INDIVIDUALLY PHOTOGRAPHED

After 15 years of innovation in our photography process, Ish Guitars has developed a way to get you the most accurate true-to-life color of every instrument we sell. We never embellish, oversaturate, or misrepresent our images, so that your buying experience can be as much like visiting our showroom as possible. Keep in mind that various computer screens can show colors a bit differently, so the color on your screen may not match the real thing perfectly no matter how hard we try. Also, unless otherwise noted, we individually list and photo every piece of gear that comes through our doors.

HEAR A LIVE DEMO

Experience our innovative Video Appointment service! Connect with one of our Gear Experts to hear this instrument played live over Zoom and receive personalized shopping guidance. Contact us to schedule your appointment!

item.title: Squier Vintage Modified Jazz Bass V 2012 - 2017 - Natural — $405.11
item.description:
$405.11 · Very Good · Full Rack Outlet

Some dings in the finish as other light wear, see photos. Otherwise in very good condition.

US shipping includes all customs fees.

item.title: Madeira EB-400 Bass Guitar — $399.95
item.description:
$399.95 · Fair · Union Music

Madeira EB400 electric bass guitar in used condition. Fully functional and structurally sound, this bass is pretty beat up, showing an extensive history of honest road wear with lots of dings, scratches, and heavy buckle rash across the body. Far from pristine, but it carries an incredible, authentic mojo and an undeniable vintage vibe that only comes from decades of real use.


Built as an imported counterpart to classic Guild designs, this bass features a comfortable body shape and a solid neck profile that feels broken in and ready to roll. The electronics setup delivers a familiar, robust, thumping low end with plenty of warmth and punch, proving that its classic sonic character matches its rugged, time tested look.


A soulful, road worn player instrument that sounds pretty good, looks even cooler, and brings a ton of vintage attitude to the stage or studio.

RoadRunner gig bag included

item.title: 1976-79 Gibson Thunderbird Bicentennial Bass Pickup set — $650
item.description:
$650 · Very Good · Bionic-Joe

Up for sale is a set of Bicentennial Gibson Thunderbird bass Pickups and mounting HarnessEs! One bridge and one neck pickup!! The readings are clear and Strong as shown In pics!!!!

item.title: SQUIER PARANORMAL RASCAL BASS HH - CANDY APPLE RED — $315
item.description:
$315 · Excellent · John's Gear Shed

Up for sale is my Squier Paranormal Rascal Bass. It’s in excellent condition – body, pickguard, neck, fretboard, headstock and hardware. It's got the offset body shape of the Fender Bass VI model, the unique headstock shape from the Fender Coronado Bass, the string-through-body bridge from the Mustang® Bass, and punchy dual Fender-Designed Wide Range humbucking bass pickups (HH) with 3-way switching. Other player-friendly details of this model include a short and easy-to-play 30" scale length, a slim and comfortable "C"-shape neck profile, and a gloss neck finish for a slick yet confident feel.

This color may be hard to find.  Fender no longer shows it as a choice on their site.

item.title: Ibanez AGB200 Artcore Semi-Hollow Electric Bass, Black Flat — $500
item.description:
$500 · Excellent · John's Gear Shed

The Ibanez AGB200 features a select-grade maple top, back and sides for a classic look and superb tonal response. With its expertly crafted set-in neck, bound rosewood fretboard, and pearl dot inlays, the AGB200 is a remarkable value. The 3-piece Artcore Maple/Mahogany neck has proven its reliability on thousands of Ibanez hollow and semi-hollow bodies throughout the years. The ACHB pickups are matched perfectly to this Ibanez Artcore bass: very responsive, warm in tone coloration, and moderate in output which helps minimize feedback.

The Ibanez hollow body story starts three decades ago with the giants of jazz guitar; the company has been a constant pioneer in the world of hollow-body since. Part of that legacy owes to the Artcore hollow body bass collection, which has earned its reputation based on luthiery know-how, and a passion for warm, full-bodied tone.


Specs
- Neck: Artcore 3pc Maple/Mahogany Bass Set-in
- Top/Back/Sides: Maple
- Frets: Large
- Fretboard: Bound Rosewood
- Inlays: Pearl dot
- Bridge: Gibraltar III Bass bridge
- Neck Pickup: ACHB-N2
- Bridge Pickup: ACHB-B2
- Hardware color: Gold

Neck Dimensions:
- Scale: 770mm/30.3"
- Width at Nut: 42mm
- Width at Last Fret 63mm
- Thickness at 1st: 21.5mm
- Thickness at 12th: 24.5mm
- Radius: 400mm

item.title: BC Rich Mockingbird Bass Model MB1007N NJ Series Super 2100 Neck MIJ - 1990 — $1,999.99
item.description:
$1,999.99 · Very Good · Northwest Vintage Guitars

Northwest Vintage Guitars presents a super rare BC Rich Mockingbird Bass Model MB-1007N made in Japan as part of the NJ Series and featuring the Super 2100 neck.   The Super 2100 is a highly sought after spec for it's smooth playing C profile and stable multi laminate construction.  The synthetic "Ebonic" fretboard has a sweet sleek look and feel.  34" scale, 10" radius, 9.80 lbs.  You also get those wonderful BC Rich Proprietary PBass and Jbass pickups that read 10.47k ohms at the neck and 8.68k ohms at the bridge.  It's a passive system with a 3 way toggle, 1V and 2 Tone.  Comes safely packed in the faux leather padded gig bag in the photos.  

The nut measures 1.65", neck depth is .81"-.93" at the 1st and 12th frets respectively.  It's a very comfortable and sleek C profile.  Accurately intonated, polished frets, and a clean and conditioned fretboard.   The neck is straight, the truss rod turns in both directions, and the relief is currently set for optimum playability.  There are a few scratches and dings as pictured.  It remains in excellent playable condition with no dead spots. 

We only consider local trades in person.  Most questions can be answered with a quick read of our info page.  This item is offered on our website and other online marketing platforms and subject to prior sale.  Please check our website for additional photos.

Buy with confidence. We offer a 7 day money-back return on all used guitars - all our guitars are guaranteed and a full refund will be issued if not received in the condition it was described and pictured.  We do allow “buy & try” preference returns and the buyer pays shipping charges.  Please read our shop policies for more information.   All our guitars are deep cleaned and have received a professional service and setup - an average of a $200 value. You will not get a filthy guitar from us.  If you are particular about cosmetic appearance, please message us for more details.  Additionally, all our guitars are shipped fully insured, and we will assist with any claims that may arise.  See the details on our Storefront.

Please ensure your address and phone number on this platform is the correct shipping address and contact info before purchasing.  We cannot change addresses, phones, or names after purchase.  Some shipping charges may be due before shipping if the actual shipping is more than advertised.  Platform rules prohibit dealing around the platform through messages so please don’t use messages on this platform to ask us to contact you outside of the platform.     

We are located in the Pacific Northwest USA and are exclusively online.

item.title: Gibson Thunderbird Chrome Neck Bridge pickup Hand Rest Covers set w Spacers 1960’s/1970’s — $600
item.description:
$600 · Very Good · Bionic-Joe

Up for sale is a set of vintage 1960s/ 1970s Gibson Thunderbird chrome bridge and neck pickup cover hand rests, Along with the shims and screws.

Hurry up and grab this ultra rare set!

item.title: Yamaha TRBX304 - Mist Green - Free Shipping — $419.99
item.description:
$419.99 · Brand New · N Stuff Music

**Please Read Our Shop Policies

TRBX300 is built around a simple principle – your performance. The perfectly balanced, ultra-comfortable solid mahogany body provides the optimum tonal foundation while the Performance EQ active circuitry gives instant access to perfectly dialed-in stage-ready tones coupled with the expressive control you need.

Body:
TRBX features a sculpted solid mahogany body, with a mass-optimized 3D design for the optimum balance between tone and comfort coupled with perfect weight distribution.

Neck:
TRBX’s neck design combines a fast, ultra-comfortable profile with 5-pc maple/mahogany laminated construction for outstanding stability and excellent tone.

Pickups:
YGD designed M3 pickups feature oversized polepieces and ceramic magnets for a clear, powerful tone with incredible definition and depth. The hum-cancelling design ensures your performance clean and noise-free while the integral thumb-rest provides unrivalled playability.

Electronics(Performance EQ):
TRBX300 models feature Yamaha’s exclusive Perfomance EQ active circuit with five performance-tuned full spectrum EQ curves optimized to give instant access to essential sounds along with powerful 2-band master equalization to shape and define your tone.

SPECS:

Scale Length: 34'' (863.6mm)
Fingerboard: Rosewood
Radius: 10'' (250mm)
Nut Width: 38mm
Body: Solid Mahogany
Neck: Maple and Mahogany 5pc
Tuners: Die-cast
Bridge: Die-cast 19mm
Pickups: MHB3n (Ceramic),MHB3b (Ceramic)
Controls: Master Volume, Pickup Balancer, Bass, Treble and Performance EQ switch
Hardware Color: Black Nickel
Weight: 7.95 lbs

item.title: Lakland Skyline 55-OS 2024 - Transparent Purple — $1,425
item.description:
$1,425 · Excellent · TallmanBRS

Great bass with Bartolini soapbars and preamp. Beautiful finish over nicely figured ash. Ships with matching strap and strap locks are included.

item.title: Schecter Riot-5 Aurora Burst — $900
item.description:
$900 · Very Good · Reverb's Garage Sale

Minor cosmetic wear throughout—small scratches/scuffs/dings. Overall in clean condition. Plays and sounds great. Does not come with case.

Sold as-described.

item.title: 2024 Fender American Ultra II Jazz Bass ⌁ Metallic Olive ⌁ — $1,750
item.description:
$1,750 · Very Good · Guitars West

2024 Fender American Ultra Jazz Bass

Up for grabs is a clean, top-tier bass that perfectly bridges premium modern engineering with classic style. Fresh out of the Corona, California factory, this 2024 Fender American Ultra Jazz Bass features a striking metallic olive sparkle finish, paired with a classic three-ply pickguard and a gorgeous rosewood fingerboard. This is Fender's flagship modern line, designed for demanding players who need ultimate precision, advanced electronics, and flawless performance.

Technical Details and Condition

Because this is an American Ultra, it features a unique "Modern D" neck profile with an ultra-satin finish that makes playing completely effortless. The fingerboard features a compound 10"-to-14" radius, meaning it gets flatter as you move up the neck for unparalleled playability and low action without buzzing. The neck heel is deeply sculpted for total access to the upper frets.

Electronically, this instrument is loaded with two Ultra Noiseless Vintage Jazz Bass single-coil pickups paired with a redesigned 18V active preamp. This gives you massive headroom, zero 60-cycle hum, and unbelievable tonal tweaking via the mini-toggle active/passive switch and three-band boost/cut EQ. The back of the headstock clearly displays the serial number US24004129, confirming its authentic 2024 USA build, complete with Fender lightweight vintage-style tuning keys.

The Ultra Preamp Evolution

While traditional Jazz Basses rely entirely on passive wiring to get their growl, the American Ultra line utilizes a high-headroom 18-volt active preamp. This is a massive leap from the standard 9-volt systems commonly used in active basses, providing pristine clarity and preventing the signal from distorting or clipping even when you dime the onboard bass boost.

The Offset Evolution

When Leo Fender introduced the Jazz Bass in 1960, it wasn't just a dual-pickup upgrade to the Precision Bass. It was intentionally designed with an "offset-waist" body to appeal directly to jazz players who preferred playing while seated. Fender actually copied the body contouring from the Jazzmaster guitar, which had debuted two years prior in 1958.

The Original Name

Before it was dubbed the Jazz Bass, early prototypes and marketing concepts referred to it as the "Deluxe Model." It was rebranded to capitalize on the popularity of the jazz music scene at the time, even though it ironically went on to define the tone of funk, rock, reggae, and punk.

The Tuner Stamping

Looking closely at the modern fluted tuners on this American Ultra, the stamped "Authentic Fender" gear markings are visible. This is a subtle visual nod to the early 1960s "reverse" Kluson tuners found on original vintage models, updated here with lightweight materials to prevent neck-dive on stage.

Guitars West Shipping & Return

In our 40 + years of business, customer service has always been the utmost Importance to us. If you have ANY questions, comments, or concerns, please contact us BEFORE purchasing this item!! We are happy to offer a short clip of the tone/sound of your preferred item as well. Just give us a call/email and we’ll get it to you asap.

We do have a Strict NO Return Policy. If you receive your item and it’s not as described, we will take that into consideration. We are very confident that our thorough, honest, detailed descriptions are backed by our knowledge of this industry. I can assure you that you?ll be getting exactly what you anticipated. If purchased on SALE/DISCOUNT, the item is considered SOLD AS IS and will NOT be considered for a return.

International Shipping: We charge an estimated flat rate fee. Our rates listed are just ESTIMATES. If it exceeds the flat rate price, the shipping amount is subject to change. Please call us for exact estimates.

 Thanks - GW Crew

item.title: Fender American Vintage II 1966 Jazz Bass - Lake Placid Blue - Free Shipping — $2,699.99
item.description:
$2,699.99 · Brand New · N Stuff Music

**Please Read Our Shop Policies

The Fender American Vintage II series presents a remarkably accurate take on the revolutionary designs that altered the course of musical history. Built with period-accurate bodies, necks and hardware, premium finishes and meticulously voiced, year-specific pickups, each instrument captures the essence of authentic Fender craftsmanship and tone.

When Don Randall at Fender Sales requested a more sophisticated, high-end bass model, the now iconic Jazz Bass was the result. The neck was narrower at the nut, providing a faster and more effortless feel and the sleek new body style mirrored the offset contoured style of the Jazzmaster. By 1966, evolution of the instrument reached new heights with striking new features.

The American Vintage II 1966 Jazz Bass features a comfortable "U" shape hard rock maple neck, and it plays like a dream with a 7.25" radius round-lam rosewood fingerboard and vintage tall frets. Characteristic of production in 1966, this J-Bass is offered with white neck binding, pearl dots, two volume controls with master tone, matching painted headstock and 4-ply tortoiseshell pickguard. The 4-saddle bridge with threaded saddles, vintage-style "lollipop" tuners and Pure Vintage '66 Jazz Bass pickups deliver classic thump and style.

The instruments in the American Vintage II series are direct descendants of the original Fenders: designed for players with a fine appreciation for vintage Fender tone and feel and built with unmatched quality, down to the last screw. These are Fender electrics in their purest form: Fender American Vintage II, the stuff of legends.

SPECS:

BODY:
Body Material: Alder
Body Finish: Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer
Body Shape: Jazz Bass
Weight: 8.95 lbs

NECK:
Neck Material: Maple
Neck Finish: Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer
Neck Shape: 1966 "U"
Scale Length: 34" (864 mm)
Fingerboard Material: Bound Round-Laminated Rosewood
Fingerboard Radius: 7.25" (184.1 mm)
Number Of Frets: 20
Fret Size: Vintage Tall
String Nut: Bone
Nut Width: 1.5" (38.1 mm)
Position Inlays: White Pearloid Dots - 7 mm

ELECTRONICS:
Bridge Pickup: Pure Vintage '66 Single-Coil Jazz Bass
Neck Pickup: Pure Vintage '66 Single-Coil Jazz Bass
Controls: Volume 1. (Middle Pickup), Volume 2. (Bridge Pickup), Master Tone
Switching: None
Configuration: SS

HARDWARE:
Bridge: Pure Vintage 4-Saddle with Threaded Steel Saddles
Hardware Finish: Nickel/Chrome
Tuning Machines: Pure Vintage ‘Lollipop’
Pickguard: 3-Ply Aged White
Control Knobs: Black Plastic
Neck Plate: 4-Bolt with "F" Logo, Serialized

MISCELLANEOUS:
Strings: Fender USA 7250M Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.105 Gauges), PN 0737250406

ACCESSORIES:
Case/Gig Bag: Vintage-Style Black (Orange Interior)

item.title: Ibanez SR885 5 String Bass Made in Japan With Hard Case — $549.95
item.description:
$549.95 · Good · B & B Loan Company

This item is pre-owned & previously used.

  • All our inventory is inspected, cleaned & detailed, tested and/or professionally set up (guitars), and ready to be used & enjoyed.
  • A basic, single picture is generally taken; but more pictures can be added by request before deciding to make a drive for local pickup. And of course more pictures can be added if we agree to ship out an item.
  • Our inventory is primary listed on Reverb for local sales & in-store pickup. We use Reverb as a means of advertising and shipping "hard to sell" items. A strong in-store used inventory keeps a brick & mortar music store still relevant in modern times. Offering a nice selection of music gear as a brick & mortar store is essential; can't be a retail music store without any inventory!!!
  • Despite our stubbornness, SOMETIMES shipping can be offered on an item to item basis. If we decide we’re ready to ship, a shipping price will be added to the listing.
  • Feel free to ask us to ship an item; the worst we can do is say, “no”. But being nasty and/or trying to “educate” us how to run a business will not convince us to make an exception. I know it can be frustrating, but we simply lack the capacity to prioritize online sales & shipping over properly operating a brick & mortar pawn shop.
  • Lastly, shipping price charged is simply my best estimate, and any overpayment will be refunded. Shipping charges across the entire United States can vary widely; so I would rather error higher than lower. And as promised, I'll refund the possible overpayment.

B & B Loan store hours: 9am - 6pm EST, Monday – Saturday. Located in Fort Wayne, IN.

Thank you for considering shopping with us!

-B & B Loan Company

item.title: Sei bass Flamboyant Headless 5 string #65 — $4,148.69
item.description:
$4,148.69 · Excellent · james's Gear Emporium

Sei bass Flamboyant Headless 5 string #65


Beautiful instrument, amazing playability.

Excellent condition no dents or scratches, the pickups have a little wear on them as shown in pictures.

Basic Sei price starts at about £3500 these days.


Specifications:

Satin finish

Amboina facing

Maple body

Ebony fingerboard with side blue LED’s

7 Piece Neck - flamed maple and wenge

34” Scale

24 Frets

19mm Spacing at Bridge 

Bartolini jazz pickups

Schack 18 volt 3-band EQ preamp. volume, pan, bass, mid, treb

Switch for LEDs

ABM adjustable bridge

Schaller Straplocks

3.774 kg

Gig Bag: Rockbag RB 20565 E Gig Bag

item.title: Spector Alejandra Villarreal Signature - Fire red — $849.99
item.description:
$849.99 · B-Stock · The Bassment

For sale a Spector Alejandra Villarreal Signature bass. Bass is in perfect working order has EMG pickups with the Tone Pump Jr. preamp. Bass has a small finish flaw on the back of the head stock. Truss rod and electronics work as they should. Bass also comes with Spector gig bag. If you have any questions feel free to contact me.

item.title: Ashbury Fretless Bass - Red — $441.14
item.description:
$441.14 · Excellent · BassBros

A great little lined fretless bass from Fender Ashbury! In great condition, would make a perfect travel bass. Gigbag included.

$549 · Good · Folkway Music

BEING SOLD AS-IS


G&L Fallout Bass Left-Handed with HSC

item.title: Fender Player II Precision Bass Rallye Orange Maple Fingerboard — $849.99
item.description:
$849.99 · Brand New · Fuller's Guitar

- Fender Authorized Dealer - This item is Brand New with Full Factory Warranty.

- The photos shown are of the actual instrument being sold.

- Our luthiers at Fuller's Guitar thoroughly inspect and set up each instrument (to factory spec action and neck relief) prior to shipping to make sure that your new instrument is gig-ready right out of the box.

- Buy risk-free with our 14 day return policy (full refund, less shipping). Check out our shop policies for more details.

Item shown:
Player II Precision Bass®, Maple Fingerboard, Rallye Orange
Model #:
0140472530
UPC #:
885978997145
Case/Gig Bag:
Classic Series Precision®/Jazz Bass® Wood Hardshell Case, P/N 0996166306 (Not Included)

Serial # MXA26006278
8lbs 8oz

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender® sound and style with the Player II Precision Bass® — a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Precision Bass radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil P bass® pickups offer sweet highs, musical mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. An adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Precision Bass has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers.

Features
Contoured Alder Body
Modern "C" Neck Profile
9.5“-Radius Maple or Rosewood Fingerboard with Rolled Edges
Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil Precision Bass® Pickups
4-Saddle Bridge with Single-Groove Steel “Barrel” Saddles
Open-Gear Tuning Machines

item.title: Epiphone T-Bird PRO Mid 2010s - Natural — $500
item.description:
$500 · Very Good · Chris's Gear Locker

Great bass in pretty much excellent condition. I marked it as very good just to make sure there was no confusion. Some light players wear but no major dings or dents. Perfect working condition. Beauty of a bass that I just don’t play much anymore. Hoping it goes to someone that’ll give it some quality time.

No case or bag. Local pick up only.

item.title: Fender MIM Partscaster Mustang Bass Loaded: Vintera II Neck, Hipshot HB10 Tuners, PJ Body, Curtis Novak Vintage Spec Pickups, Leon Quan Badass II Bridge, CTS Pots, Coral Red — $749.95
item.description:
$749.95 · Excellent · B & B Loan Company

This item is pre-owned & previously used.

  • All our inventory is inspected, cleaned & detailed, tested and/or professionally set up (guitars), and ready to be used & enjoyed.
  • A basic, single picture is generally taken; but more pictures can be added by request before deciding to make a drive for local pickup. And of course more pictures can be added if we agree to ship out an item.
  • Our inventory is primary listed on Reverb for local sales & in-store pickup. We use Reverb as a means of advertising and shipping "hard to sell" items. A strong in-store used inventory keeps a brick & mortar music store still relevant in modern times. Offering a nice selection of music gear as a brick & mortar store is essential; can't be a retail music store without any inventory!!!
  • Despite our stubbornness, SOMETIMES shipping can be offered on an item to item basis. If we decide we’re ready to ship, a shipping price will be added to the listing.
  • Feel free to ask us to ship an item; the worst we can do is say, “no”. But being nasty and/or trying to “educate” us how to run a business will not convince us to make an exception. I know it can be frustrating, but we simply lack the capacity to prioritize online sales & shipping over properly operating a brick & mortar pawn shop.
  • Lastly, shipping price charged is simply my best estimate, and any overpayment will be refunded. Shipping charges across the entire United States can vary widely; so I would rather error higher than lower. And as promised, I'll refund the possible overpayment.

B & B Loan store hours: 9am - 6pm EST, Monday – Saturday. Located in Fort Wayne, IN.

Thank you for considering shopping with us!

-B & B Loan Company

item.title: Egmond Typhoon B2V V2 Bass 1960 Natural — $975
item.description:
$975 · Very Good · Milwaukee Guitar Collective

*Milwaukee Guitar Collective has been a TOP 300 Reverb Seller since 2023*

1960's Egmond Typhoon in Black finish. This bass is in all original Very Good condition. All electronics function properly, setup is great on this bass. NON-ORIGINAL Fender soft case.

This bass will be meticulously packaged and shipped in a NEW box, typically on the same day. PLEASE see our awesome feedback!

item.title: Kala U-Bass 2010's - Natural — $199
item.description:
$199 · Good · Milwaukee Guitar Collective

*Milwaukee Guitar Collective has been a TOP 300 Reverb Seller since 2023*

Kala U-Bass in natural finish. Passive pickup works perfectly. Good setup and easy to play. This instrument comes with a very good quality gig bag that is also in good condition. small ding on the back of the neck, access cover is missing.

This bass will be meticulously packaged and shipped in a NEW box, typically on the same day. PLEASE see our awesome feedback!

$1,473.14 · Excellent · JMG

(Middle Pickup), Volume 2. (Bridge Pickup), Master Tone Country Of Origin US Dimensions 6.50x18.00x50.50 IN Fingerboard Rosewood Fingerboard Radius 9.5" (241 mm) Fret Size Medium Jumbo Hardware Finish Chrome Model Name American Standard Jazz Bass® (2008-2012), Rosewood Fingerboard, 3-Color Sunburst Neck Finish Tinted Satin Urethane Back with Gloss Headstock Face Neck Material Maple Neck Pickup American Standard Single-Coil Jazz Bass® Neck Pickup American Standard Single-Coil Jazz Bass® Neck Shape Modern "C" Number of Frets 20 Nut Material Synthetic Bone Nut Width 1.5" (38.1 mm) Orientation Right-Hand Pickguard 4-Ply Brown Shell Pickup Configuration SS Pickup Switching None Position Inlays White Dot Refinement Neck Material Maple Refinement Neck Shape C Shape Refinement Pickups American Standard Scale Length 34" (864 mm) Series American Standard String Nut Synthetic Bone Strings Fender® USA 8250M Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.110TW Gauges), PN 0738250406 Truss Rod Wrench 3/16" Hex (Allen) Truss Rods Posiflex™ Graphite Neck Support Rods Tuning Machines Fender® "F" Light-Weight Vintage-Paddle Keys with Tapered Shafts

item.title: 2002 Fender Precision Bass '70 Vintage Reissue PB70-70US Olympic White, Japan CIJ — $1,399.99
item.description:
$1,399.99 · Excellent · Mike & Mike's Guitar Bar

Up for sale, a 2002 Fender Precision Bass ‘70 vintage reissue model PB70-70US in excellent, 100% original condition and in perfect working order. A "Crafted in Japan" model, this bass features a factory-installed Fender American Standard split coil P Bass pickup, along with select vintage-spec touches including a block logo on the headstock and three-ply black pickguard.

One welcome deviation from vintage spec is a thick slab rosewood fretboard (as opposed to a thinner veneer board seen on actual vintage examples). With an alder body as its sonic foundation, this bass delivers the goods with warm thump, excellent articulation, and sweet treble growl. Weighing 9lbs 2oz, this PB70-70US Precision Bass has been professionally setup here at Mike & Mike’s Guitar Bar with 45-100 roundwound strings, comfortable action, and accurate intonation.

Neck Specs:

  • Wood: Maple
  • Shape: Slender C, measuring .815” 1st fret, .930” 12th fret
  • Fretboard: Rosewood slab, vintage-spec 7 1/4" radius
  • Frets: Medium jumbo, leveled/crowned, no wear
  • Scale Length: 34”
  • Nut: 1 5/8”, bone
  • Tuners: Clover buttons
  • Serialization: “Crafted in Japan,” P-prefix

Body Specs:

  • Wood: Alder
  • Pickups: PB-Vintage split-coil (USA-made)
  • Controls: Volume, Tone
  • Hardware: Bridge with steel barrel saddles, flat-top knurled knobs
  • Plastics: Three-ply black pickguard

The gloss Olympic White finish exhibits subtle yellowing of the clear coat, with a few minor dings, predominantly concentrated at the lower bout. The ambered gloss on the neck profile is smooth and clean, with a few shallow marks in the lower registers that are not distracting to the palm while fretting.

A gigbag is included.
